name: Bugs on a Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a stalk of celery in half.
2. Spread peanut butter down the center of each celery piece.
3. Place chocolate chips on top to resemble "bugs" crawling up the celery.
Variations: Cream cheese or Cheez Whiz can be used instead of peanut butter, and raisins can be added for extra flavor.
